title: Are these DVDs bootlegs Help a first timer
display_title: Are these DVDs bootlegs Help a first timer
wikitext:
[]: Are these DVDs bootlegs? Help a first timer!             Quote Post by Charles » Thu Oct 03, 2013 4:49 pm Hi! I'm looking forward to watching (and owning) Evangelion for the first time! After doing some research I've found that the go to box set (the platinum collection) is a little expensive! Best I've found is about $80. After looking around eBay I found some questionable sets that I figured should be left to the experts! They are all coming from Malaysia. Cheapest I found was this one that states it has the Eng Dub on the entire TV series and movies. LINK REMOVED However this one (which looks the same I guess since it's a stock image) says it does not have the Eng dub for the two movies. LINK REMOVED Then there's this one where on the box it states there's an Eng dub for everything. LINK REMOVED I'm sorry if this question has been asked before. I did do some searching around and couldn't find anyone asking about these items in-particular. Are these too good to be true? Thanks for the help!

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Oct 03, 2013 5:06 pm Well the first two feature a character on the cover that's not even from the show.....so there's that. The last one....seems a bit more legitimate.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 03, 2013 5:13 pm Every one of those is a bootleg. If it helps, RightStuf still has some thin pack sets in stock, and that's the release I would recommend, as it has the highest datarate and quality of all the releases. http://www.rightstuf.com/1-800-338-6827/catalogmgr/rrnJubPsjlPsf0P0Xj/browse/item/67745/4/0/0 Also, I must unfortunately remove all of those links, because we have a no bootleg linking rule. If it helps, here are the four legitimate North American Platinum releases on Amazon: http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Platinum-Complete/dp/1413912834 http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Platinum-Collection/dp/B000767QTA http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Platinum-Collection/dp/B000VLL0O8 http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Complete-Collection/dp/B001GTFP1I

[]:             Quote Post by Charles » Thu Oct 03, 2013 5:15 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Well the first two feature a character on the cover that's not even from the show.....so there's that. The last one....seems a bit more legitimate.

[]: Re: Are these DVDs bootlegs? Help a first timer!             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Oct 03, 2013 5:17 pm Charles wrote: Are these too good to be true?

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Sun Oct 06, 2013 7:35 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Well the first two feature a character on the cover that's not even from the show.....so there's that. The last one....seems a bit more legitimate.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 06, 2013 8:27 pm Feast your eyes on this terrible sack of fail: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Oct 06, 2013 8:36 pm Who is that character in the middle even supposed to be? That doesn't even look like a design style normally associated Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 06, 2013 11:26 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Feast your eyes on this terrible sack of fail

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Oct 07, 2013 10:45 am There are a couple bootleg threads floating around, might be a good idea to merge and sticky them. Besides those with bootleg in the title, there's also http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11138/Evangelion-products-and-counterfeits/.

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Wed Oct 09, 2013 4:17 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Feast your eyes on this terrible sack of fail: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Oct 09, 2013 10:42 pm So someone bothered to color Shinji's plugsuit blue but couldn't find a decent Rei image to insert? Lazy!

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Oct 21, 2013 7:11 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Feast your eyes on this terrible sack of fail: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 21, 2013 10:55 am Doesn't look like it to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 21, 2013 11:21 am Some random 90's-style anime character, but while I recognise the style, I can't cite an example.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Oct 21, 2013 12:08 pm Yeah, you're probably right. Of course, there is a much better way to deduce that it is in fact a bootleg: the characters are all smiling.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Oct 22, 2013 5:24 pm And we're agreed that said mystery character didn't pop for like a half second somewhere in Episodes 25-26.
